title: Stoke
description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add 1 random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
upgraded_description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add 1 random [gold]Upgraded[/gold] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
notes: The number of cards generated equals the number of cards in hand when played. All generated cards are added to hand.
